arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the SES email identity.

configuration_set_name.description: The name of the configuration set associated with the email identity.

dkim_signing_attributes.description: Attributes related to DKIM (DomainKeys Identified Mail) signing for the email identity.

id.description: The unique identifier of the SES email identity.

identity_type.description: The type of identity (e.g., email address or domain) verified by SES.

tags.description: Tags associated with the SES email identity for categorization and management.

verified_for_sending_status.description: Indicates whether the email identity is verified and authorized for sending emails.
